name: runway-api-mcp-server
description: Generate, edit, and upscale images and videos with Runway, with inline previews in the chat.
long_description: Calls the Runway API for image generation (gen4_image), video generation (gen4_turbo), video editing (gen4_aleph), and video upscaling. Results are rendered inline in the Claude Desktop chat via an MCP App UI viewer with a Download button.

tools.name: runway_generateImage
tools.description: Generate an image from a text prompt.

tools.name: runway_generateVideo
tools.description: Generate a video from an image and a text prompt.

tools.name: runway_editVideo
tools.description: Edit a video using Runway Aleph.

tools.name: runway_upscaleVideo
tools.description: Upscale a video to a higher resolution.

tools.name: runway_getTask
tools.description: Get the details of a Runway task.

tools.name: runway_refreshTaskUrl
tools.description: Get a fresh download URL for a previously generated Runway task.

tools.name: runway_cancelTask
tools.description: Cancel or delete a Runway task.

tools.name: runway_getOrg
tools.description: Get organization info including credit balance.

runwayml_api_secret.title: Runway API key
runwayml_api_secret.description: Your Runway API secret (key_...). Get one at https://dev.runwayml.com.

mcp_tool_timeout.title: Tool timeout (ms)
mcp_tool_timeout.description: How long Claude waits for a tool to finish before timing out. Runway generations can take a while, so this defaults to 1000000 ms (~16 min).
